name: Tokyo Yokohama TMS Clinic - Minato Tokyo
name_ja: 東京横浜TMSクリニック みなと東京院
description_long: Tokyo Yokohama TMS Clinic is one of Japan's leading TMS-specialized clinics, operated by Medical Corporation Cocoromi. With over 1,000 TMS cases per year and registered as one of the top-volume TMS providers across 20 major universities and 57 medical institutions in Japan, the clinic offers evidence-based rTMS therapy optimized for each patient. Insurance-covered rTMS treatment has been available since June 2019. The Minato Tokyo branch serves the Tamachi/Mita area of central Tokyo.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Takeshi Ohnishi
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Leads the Tokyo Yokohama TMS Clinic network with extensive clinical experience in rTMS therapy. Oversees one of Japan's largest TMS treatment databases, contributing to national TMS research consortiums including TReC-J.

name: Brain Clinic Tokyo
name_ja: ブレインクリニック東京
description_long: Brain Clinic is a psychiatry clinic in Tokyo specializing in QEEG (Quantitative Electroencephalography) diagnostics and TMS therapy. Based on the latest neuroscience, they provide diagnostic and treatment services for developmental disorders (ADHD/ASD), panic disorder, anxiety disorders, sleep disorders, PTSD, and autonomic nervous system disorders. Founded by Dr. Yu Kawaguchi, the clinic operates locations in Nihonbashi (Tokyo Station area) and Shinjuku.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Yu Kawaguchi
doctors_data.title: Founder / Director
doctors_data.bio: Founder of Brain Clinic, specializing in neuroscience-based diagnostic and treatment approaches. Pioneered the combination of QEEG brain mapping with personalized TMS treatment protocols in Japan.

name: Tokyo TMS Mindfulness Clinic
name_ja: 東京TMSマインドフルネスクリニック
description_long: Tokyo TMS Mindfulness Clinic is one of Tokyo's few TMS-specialized medical facilities. The clinic focuses on treating depression symptoms, insomnia, and ADHD without relying on medication, offering root-cause treatment through brain-function improvement. The clinic emphasizes smart treatment scheduling, easy reservations, and transparent pricing to make TMS therapy accessible to working professionals.

doctors_data.name: Director (Name not publicly listed)
doctors_data.title: Medical Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Leads the Tokyo TMS Mindfulness Clinic, providing specialized TMS treatment with physician aftercare follow-up for depression, insomnia, and ADHD.

name: Besli Clinic Tokyo
name_ja: ベスリクリニック東京
description_long: Besli Clinic Tokyo is a psychosomatic medicine clinic for working professionals, located 1 minute from Kanda Station. Since 2017, the clinic has been a pioneer in TMS therapy in Japan, with over 5,000 cumulative TMS treatment cases across the Besli Group. The clinic combines TMS therapy with Kampo (Chinese herbal medicine) and counseling for relapse prevention, and all physicians have experience as occupational health doctors.
address: Kanda Kajimachi 3-2, Kanda Sanmi Building 8F, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo

doctors_data.name: Dr. Takagi
doctors_data.title: Psychiatrist / Occupational Health Doctor
doctors_data.bio: Psychiatrist at Besli Clinic with occupational health experience. Provides TMS treatment combined with Kampo medicine and counseling for working professionals experiencing depression and burnout.

name: Shimokitazawa Psychosomatic Medical Clinic
name_ja: 下北沢心療内科クリニック
description_long: Shimokitazawa Psychosomatic Medical Clinic is a psychosomatic medicine, psychiatry, and TMS treatment clinic in the Shimokitazawa area of Setagaya, Tokyo. The clinic offers English-language TMS consultations and treatment, making it accessible to international patients. TMS has been FDA-approved since 2008 and MHLW-approved in Japan since 2018. The clinic also offers herbal medicine (Kampo) as part of its holistic treatment approach.
address: Kitazawa 2-10-15, Shimokitazawa High Town 4F, Setagaya-ku, Tokyo

doctors_data.name: Director (English Available)
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.specialty: TMS Therapy, Kampo Medicine, Psychosomatic Medicine
doctors_data.bio: Provides TMS treatment and herbal medicine in Shimokitazawa with English-language support for international patients. Part of a psychiatric network collaborating on brain disease treatment.

name: National Center Hospital of Neurology and Psychiatry (NCNP)
name_ja: 国立精神・神経医療研究センター病院
description_long: The National Center Hospital of Neurology and Psychiatry (NCNP) is one of Japan's five National Medical Research Centers, affiliated with the Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare. The hospital provides patient-centered care for psychiatric, neurological, muscular, and developmental diseases with 486 inpatient beds. The Integrative Brain Imaging Center conducts active TMS and rTMS research, and the Department of Psychiatry provides evidence-based treatment for schizophrenia, mood disorders, dementia, sleep disorders, dependence, and epilepsy.

doctors_data.name: NCNP Psychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Psychiatry
doctors_data.university: National Center of Neurology and Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: The Department of Psychiatry at NCNP provides evidence-based diagnoses and treatment plans using biological, psychological, and environmental assessments. Active research in TMS-EEG and neural oscillation modulation.

name: Ginza Psychosomatic Medicine Clinic
name_ja: 銀座心療内科クリニック
description_long: Ginza Psychosomatic Medicine Clinic is a mental health clinic located 2 minutes from Ginza Station (A3 exit), next to GINZA SIX. The clinic provides TMS treatment using the NeuroStar system and offers comprehensive psychiatric care. The clinic's TMS program is informed by FDA data showing 78% clinically significant symptom improvement in patients treated with the NeuroStar device.
address: Ginza 5-9-13, Ginza Kikumasa Building 3F, Chuo-ku, Tokyo

doctors_data.name: Clinic Director
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.bio: Director of Ginza Psychosomatic Medicine Clinic, providing TMS treatment with the NeuroStar system in central Ginza. Offers comprehensive mental health care in a convenient location for working professionals.

name: Asakayama Hospital - rTMS Treatment Center
name_ja: 浅香山病院 rTMS治療室
description_long: Asakayama Hospital is a comprehensive hospital in Sakai, Osaka with 100 years of psychiatric care history. The hospital introduced insurance-covered rTMS treatment in January 2020, shortly after national insurance approval. As of March 2025, the hospital has treated 48 patients with a remarkable 52% remission rate. The rTMS team consists of multiple physicians, nurses, and clinical psychologists. Asakayama Hospital is a founding member of the Kansai TMS Network alongside Osaka Medical and Pharmaceutical University, Kansai Medical University, Hannan Hospital, and Wakayama Medical University.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Shun Takahashi
doctors_data.title: rTMS Lead Physician
doctors_data.university: Osaka University Graduate School of Medicine, Department of Psychiatry (Lecturer)
doctors_data.bio: Specialist in brain stimulation therapy and mood disorders. Serves as a member of the Japanese Society of Psychiatry and Neurology's rTMS Appropriate Use Guidelines Working Group, the Japanese Society of Mood Disorders' Neuromodulation Committee, and co-representative of the Kansai TMS Network. Also serves as Special Deputy Director of Asakayama Hospital's Clinical Research Training Center.

name: A&O Mental Clinic Osaka Nakatsu
description_long: A&O Mental Clinic (formerly Wako Psychiatric Clinic) is a psychosomatic medicine, psychiatry, and child psychiatry clinic in the Umeda/Nakatsu area of Osaka. The clinic has introduced TMS as a non-invasive treatment for depression that stimulates the cerebral cortex, offering a good balance of safety and efficacy without medication side effects. The clinic also provides child psychiatry services for patients aged junior high school and above.
address: Toyosaki 3-13-6, Fuji Terrace Osaka Umeda 3F, Kita-ku, Osaka

doctors_data.name: Clinic Director
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.specialty: TMS Therapy, Child Psychiatry, Psychosomatic Medicine
doctors_data.bio: Director of A&O Mental Clinic in Osaka, providing TMS treatment and child/adolescent psychiatric care in the Umeda area. Offers magnetic stimulation therapy as a non-invasive alternative to medication for depression.

name: Seoul Psychiatry Gangnam
description_long: Seoul Psychiatry Gangnam is a leading English-speaking psychiatric clinic in Seoul's Gangnam district, specializing in rTMS therapy for international patients. Led by Dr. Paul J. Woo, the clinic treats over 200 international patients annually and uses the BrainsWay Deep TMS system, which is FDA-approved and targets deeper brain structures than conventional surface rTMS. Located 1 minute from Seolleung Station Exit 7, the clinic offers same-week consultations for international patients with treatment plans integrating psychotherapy, brain stimulation, and medication management.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Paul J. Woo
doctors_data.title: Lead Psychiatrist
doctors_data.specialty: Mood Disorders, Anxiety Disorders, rTMS Therapy, International Patient Mental Health
doctors_data.university: Johns Hopkins University (MPH), University of Maryland Mood and Anxiety Disorders Program
doctors_data.bio: Board-certified psychiatrist with over 10 years of clinical experience. Earned Master of Public Health from Johns Hopkins University and trained at the University of Maryland's Mood and Anxiety Disorders Program. Certified Teacher at SIYLI (Search Inside Yourself Leadership Institute, developed at Google). Treats 200+ international patients annually with refined rTMS protocols specifically for English-speaking patients.

name: Gangnam Severance Hospital - Department of Psychiatry
description_long: Gangnam Severance Hospital, established in 1983 as part of Yonsei University Health System (YUHS), is a major tertiary hospital in Gangnam, Seoul. The Department of Psychiatry has been a leader in Korean psychiatry since 1923, providing cutting-edge treatment through virtual reality therapy rooms, magnetic stimulation (TMS), and neurofeedback therapy. The department has conducted clinical trials on accelerated rTMS protocols for major depressive disorder and continues innovative neuromodulation research.

doctors_data.name: Gangnam Severance Psychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Psychiatry, Yonsei University College of Medicine
doctors_data.bio: The Psychiatry Department of Gangnam Severance Hospital is affiliated with Yonsei University College of Medicine. Has conducted clinical trials on accelerated, conventional, and sham rTMS for treating major depressive disorder, with published research in international journals.

name: Seoul St. Mary's Hospital - TMS Clinic
description_long: Seoul St. Mary's Hospital, the representative teaching hospital of the Catholic University of Korea's College of Medicine, was the first in South Korea to introduce rTMS in its psychiatry department. The Brain Stimulation Clinic (경두개자기자극 클리닉) provides comprehensive TMS treatment programs including drug treatment, psychotherapy, cognitive behavioral therapy, meditation, and brain stimulation therapy. The hospital has published clinical research on both standard and miniaturized rTMS devices for depression, as well as rTMS for PTSD.

doctors_data.name: Seoul St. Mary's Psychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Psychiatry, Catholic University of Korea
doctors_data.university: Catholic University of Korea College of Medicine
doctors_data.bio: Pioneered rTMS introduction in Korean psychiatry. Conducted clinical research on miniaturized rTMS efficacy (54 patients with unipolar MDD, 2015-2016) and low-frequency rTMS for PTSD treatment. The department integrates brain stimulation with CBT, meditation, and pharmacotherapy.

name: Samsung Medical Center - Department of Psychiatry
description_long: Samsung Medical Center (SMC) is a premier tertiary hospital in Gangnam-gu, Seoul, with over 1,000 doctors and 8 specialized centers. The Department of Psychiatry offers neuromodulation as a core treatment modality alongside pharmacotherapy, digital therapeutics, and transdiagnostic psychosocial interventions. SMC's Neuroscience Center conducts advanced research across neurology and psychiatry, making it one of Korea's leading centers for brain stimulation therapies.

doctors_data.name: Samsung Medical Center Psychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Psychiatry
doctors_data.bio: The Psychiatry Department at Samsung Medical Center provides comprehensive mental health care through evidence-based approaches including neuromodulation, pharmacotherapy, digital therapeutics, and transdiagnostic psychosocial interventions.

name: Brain Treatment Center Seoul - Hoegi
description_long: Brain Treatment Center Seoul (Hoegi location) provides MeRT (Magnetic e-Resonance Therapy), a personalized form of TMS that uses qEEG brain mapping to tailor treatment protocols for each individual. The center treats conditions including PTSD, traumatic brain injury, depression, autism, and supports sports recovery. MeRT combines the precision of qEEG diagnostics with customized TMS protocols, targeting specific brain regions based on individual brainwave patterns.

doctors_data.name: BTC Seoul Clinical Team
doctors_data.title: MeRT Specialists
doctors_data.bio: The Brain Treatment Center Seoul team provides personalized MeRT therapy using qEEG brain mapping to create individualized TMS protocols. Part of the global Brain Treatment Center network with locations in the US and Asia.

name: Bundang Seoul National University Hospital - TMS Center
description_long: Bundang Seoul National University Hospital (SNUBH), the largest hospital in Gyeonggi Province, is affiliated with Seoul National University College of Medicine. The Department of Neuropsychiatry operates a Brain Function Regulation Lab (뇌기능조절실) that provides transcranial magnetic stimulation therapy. The Neuropsychiatry Department includes five major clinics: Mood Disorder Clinic, Geriatric Psychiatry Clinic, Sleep Disorder and Stress Clinic, and Child and Adolescent Psychiatric Clinic.

doctors_data.name: SNUBH Neuropsychiatry Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Neuropsychiatry
doctors_data.specialty: Brain Stimulation Therapy, Mood Disorders, Sleep Medicine
doctors_data.university: Seoul National University College of Medicine
doctors_data.bio: The Neuropsychiatry Department at Bundang Seoul National University Hospital operates the Brain Function Regulation Lab providing TMS therapy. Offers bio-feedback, light treatment, and cognitive rehabilitation alongside brain stimulation therapies.

name: Asan Medical Center - Department of Rehabilitation Medicine
description_long: Asan Medical Center is South Korea's largest hospital and the teaching hospital of the University of Ulsan College of Medicine. The Department of Rehabilitation Medicine has extensive experience using repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) for neurological recovery, including post-stroke rehabilitation for dysphagia (swallowing difficulty), dysarthria (speech difficulties), and motor recovery. Clinical studies have been conducted on TMS effects for patients with brain injuries since 2013.

doctors_data.name: Asan Rehabilitation Medicine Faculty
doctors_data.title: Department of Rehabilitation Medicine
doctors_data.specialty: rTMS for Neurological Recovery, Post-Stroke Rehabilitation
doctors_data.university: University of Ulsan College of Medicine
doctors_data.bio: The Department of Rehabilitation Medicine at Asan Medical Center has published multiple studies on rTMS for post-stroke recovery. Clinical research since 2013 demonstrates expertise in using TMS for dysphagia, dysarthria, and motor recovery in brain injury patients.

name: YNK Clinic (Yonsei U&Kim Psychiatry)
description_long: YNK Clinic (Yonsei U&Kim Psychiatry) is a private psychiatric clinic in the Samsung-dong/Daechi-dong area of Gangnam, Seoul, near Samsung and Seolleung stations. The clinic offers TMS (transcranial magnetic stimulation) therapy alongside cognitive behavioral therapy and comprehensive psychiatric care. Led by Director Yoo Sang-woo, the clinic specializes in depression, social anxiety, panic disorder, and adolescent mental health including test anxiety.

doctors_data.name: Dr. Yoo Sang-woo
doctors_data.title: Director / Psychiatrist
doctors_data.specialty: TMS Therapy, CBT, Depression, Anxiety Disorders
doctors_data.bio: Director of YNK Clinic specializing in TMS therapy and cognitive behavioral therapy for depression, social anxiety, panic disorder, and adolescent mental health issues in the Gangnam area of Seoul.
